stemHtml: As a student at a flight school, you've been provided with a portable electronic device (PED) equipped with checklists and aircraft standard operating procedures (SOP's).

options.a: Each PED is connected to a specific aircraft type of the same class.
options.b: Each PED is connected to a unique tail number ex. D-EASA.
options.c: Each PED is connected to different class (MEP).
options.d: Each PED is connected to a single aircraft.
